name: Suspicious Teams Application Related ObjectAcess Event
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @SerkinValery
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Teams Application Related ObjectAcess Event
SIGMA Description: Detects an access to authentication tokens and accounts of Microsoft Teams desktop application.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4663 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\cookies%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\local storage\leveldb%')) AND (NOT(LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Teams Application Related ObjectAcess Event on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4663 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\cookies%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\local storage\leveldb%')) AND (NOT(LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Teams Application Related ObjectAcess Event
